ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle listing */,
  "date_crawled" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle data was crawled */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle listing */,
  "seller" TEXT /* Seller type (e.g., private, dealer) */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., Offer, Auction) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "abtest" TEXT /* A/B test group for pricing strategies */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., bus, sedan) */,
  "year_of_registration" INTEGER /* Year of registration of the vehicle */,
  "gearbox" TEXT /* Gearbox type (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "power_ps" INTEGER /* Power output of the vehicle in PS */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "kilometer" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle in kilometers */,
  "month_of_registration" TEXT /* Month of registration of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type of the vehicle (e.g., Diesel, Gasoline) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the vehicle */,
  "not_repaired_damage" TEXT /* Indicates if the vehicle has not been repaired after damage */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle listing was created */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the seller's location */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle listing was last seen */,
  "year_of_creation" INTEGER /* Year of creation of the listing record */,
  "year_crawled" INTEGER /* Year when the data was crawled */,
  "month_of_creation" TEXT /* Month of creation of the listing */,
  "month_crawled" TEXT /* Month when the data was crawled */,
  "no_of_days_online" INTEGER /* Total number of days the vehicle listing has been online */,
  "no_of_hrs_online" REAL /* Total number of hours the vehicle listing has been online */,
  "years_old" INTEGER /* Age of the vehicle in years */,
  "months_old" INTEGER /* Age of the vehicle in months */,
  "vehicle_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "exterior_color" TEXT /* Exterior color of the vehicle */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "number_of_owners" INTEGER /* Number of previous owners of the vehicle */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle's warranty expires */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "mileage_unit" TEXT /* Unit of mileage (e.g., km, miles) */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standard of the vehicle */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors on the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_seller FOREIGN KEY ("seller") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_type" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., private, dealer) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "seller_city" TEXT /* City where the seller is located */,
  "seller_country" TEXT /* Country where the seller is located */,
  "seller_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "seller_email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "seller_rating" REAL /* Rating of the seller based on user feedback */,
  "seller_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the seller has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle associated with the offer */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., Offer, Auction) */,
  "offer_price" REAL /* Price associated with the offer */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the offer */,
  "offer_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the offer */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., Active, Expired, Sold) */,
  "offer_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "offer_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "offer_discount" REAL /* Discount associated with the offer */,
  "offer_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions or terms of the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle related to the analytics */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the vehicle listing has received */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites marked by users */,
  "inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries made regarding the vehicle */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the vehicle listing */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the vehicle listing */,
  "average_time_spent" REAL /* Average time users spend on the vehicle listing page */,
  "user_engagement_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating user engagement with the listing */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
